title: Scheduler Appointment Data Source
description: Defines the data source types for scheduler appointments.

sections.title: Type Definition
sections.description: Union type defining different ways to provide appointment data to the scheduler.

data.content: export type AXSchedulerAppointmentDataSource = AXSchedulerAppointment[] | AXSchedulerAppointmentLoader | AXSchedulerAppointmentLoaderAsync;

props.name: AXSchedulerAppointmentDataSource
props.description: Union type that can be either an array of appointments, a synchronous loader function, or an asynchronous loader function.
